name: Aegis Alpha — Balanced Mandate

strategy.summary: AI-driven momentum + regime rotation across USDC.e / WETH / WBTC / W0G on Jaine V3. Every trade is intent-bound to a TEE-attested GLM-5-FP8 inference response, sealed via commit-reveal to defeat MEV.
strategy.thesis: Regime-aware position sizing. Up-trend → scale into majors (WBTC/WETH) and native W0G up to 50% single-asset cap. Range/panic → rotate to USDC.e base. Every decision EIP-712 intent-bound to the exact 0G Compute inference response hash via ExecutionIntent.attestationReportHash.

fees.note: Fees in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%). Caps enforced on-chain: perf 3000, mgmt 500, entry 200, exit 200.

inputs: 15m / 1h / 4h OHLCV for USDC.e/WETH, USDC.e/WBTC, USDC.e/W0G on Jaine V3
outputs: regime: UP_STRONG | UP | RANGE_QUIET | RANGE_NOISY | DOWN | PANIC
action: BUY | SELL | HOLD per asset pair

attestation.mechanism: TEE-signed ECDSA over keccak256(provider, chatId, model, contentDigest)

contractEnforced: confidenceThresholdBps floor — vault rejects intents below
maxPositionBps ceiling — vault rejects sizing above
stopLossBps trigger — position auto-exit on drawdown
cooldownSeconds between-trade — vault rejects within cooldown
maxActionsPerDay rate limit — vault rejects after daily cap
both-sides asset whitelist — assetIn AND assetOut must be in _allowedAssets
commit-reveal block gap — sealed mode requires ≥ 1 block between commit and reveal
attestedSigner signature match — ecrecover must match policy.attestedSigner
operatorSide: STRICT_MODE=1 refuses trade on stale market data or 0G Compute failure
CoinGecko fallback disabled under strict mode
Orchestrator re-fetches Pyth prices every cycle
TEE signer key stored separately from hot executor key (config invariant)

slashConditions: Execution deviating from declared strategy (trading asset not in allowedAssets above)
Signing inference not actually produced by the declared AI model (zai-org/GLM-5-FP8)
Bypassing stop-loss, cooldown, or maxActionsPerDay via contract policy update post-register
Collusion with MEV infrastructure outside the committed commit-reveal scheme
Failure to publish a new bonded manifest when strategy materially changes
disclosures: Operator hot wallet key is separate from TEE signer key (enforced in orchestrator config).
No off-chain inputs beyond those listed in ai.inputs.
Arbitrator can slash up to 50% of stake per 7-day rolling window (OperatorStaking at 0xe153A071FBFFa20Bd1a016C545745EFcAC3F2bc3).
